name: Ambetter Health 400
comments: Joey Logano has won the Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway, his 32nd career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 20 (unapproved adjustments)
